Describe the sequence of product labels and text visible on the spray cans throughout the clip.
canonical_answer: At 6s, a silver aerosol can with a white cap appears in the frame; at 7s, the text 'PURE' becomes visible on the label; at 8s, 'DRY TEXTURIZING SPRAY' is read below; at 10s, a can labeled 'FOIL' is shown; at 11s, French text appears at the bottom of the label.

question: Outline the visual details of the aerosol cans as they are presented from start to finish.
canonical_answer: At 6s, the silver foil-patterned body is displayed; at 7s, the brand logo 'R+Co' is seen at the top; at 8s, the white plastic cap is highlighted; at 10s, the label changes to show 'THICK + STYLING'; at 12s, the French description is visible below the English text.
